REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (152 4th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for (administrator) Debra Dolch.

The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $1,560,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 7/13/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in excess of $880,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
